**Document Analysis — GI Doctor Notes (Redacted)**

The document is a redacted gastroenterology clinical note. Key clinical themes typically present in GI notes include: GI symptoms (abdominal pain, bloating, altered bowel habits), potential inflammatory markers, nutritional absorption concerns, and GI-related health management. I will now construct the 8 structured objects following the BloomCell framework.
